ClientMode.title: Client Mode
ClientMode.description: The client mode that Santa should operate in.

FailClosed.title: Deny on Read Error
FailClosed.description: Deny execution in LOCKDOWN mode if there is an error reading or processing an executable file.

FileChangesRegex.title: File Changes Regex
FileChangesRegex.description: Path regexes (ICU format) to monitor for file changes.

FileChangesPrefixFilters.title: File Changes Prefix Filters
FileChangesPrefixFilters.description: Path prefixes to exclude from file change logging.

Telemetry.title: Telemetry
Telemetry.description: Types of telemetry events that should be logged.

AllowedPathRegex.title: Allowed Path Regex
AllowedPathRegex.description: Path regexes (ICU format) of binaries to allow. Lower precedent than binary, certificate, and Team ID scopes.

BlockedPathRegex.title: Blocked Path Regex
BlockedPathRegex.description: Path regexes (ICU format) of binaries to block. Lower precedent than binary, certificate, and Team ID scopes.

EnableBadSignatureProtection.title: Bad Signature Protection
EnableBadSignatureProtection.description: Block binaries with a bad signing chain, unless explicitly allowed.

EnablePageZeroProtection.title: Enable Page Zero Protection
EnablePageZeroProtection.description: Block 32-bit binaries missing the __PAGEZERO segment, unless explicitly allowed.

EnableTransitiveRules.title: Enable Transitive Rules
EnableTransitiveRules.description: Allow transitive rules created by compiler-type rules.

identifier.title: Identifier
identifier.description:
The identifier for this rule. The required format depends on rule_type:
• BINARY / CERTIFICATE — SHA-256 hash (64 hex characters)
• TEAMID — 10-character alphanumeric Team ID (e.g. ZMCG7MLDV9)
• SIGNINGID — TeamID:SigningID (e.g. EQHXZ8M8AV:com.google.Chrome), or platform:SigningID for Apple platform binaries (e.g. platform:com.apple.curl)
• CDHASH — Code Directory Hash (40 hex characters)

rule_type.title: Rule Type
rule_type.description: The type of rule. Also determines the required format of the identifier and the rule's evaluation precedence: CDHash → Binary → SigningID → Certificate → TeamID.

policy.title: Policy
policy.description: The action to take when this rule matches an execution. ALLOWLIST_COMPILER rules create transitive allow rules for files written by the matched process; if EnableTransitiveRules is false they are treated as ALLOWLIST. CEL rules evaluate the expression in cel_expr to make their decision.

cel_expr.title: CEL Expression
cel_expr.description: A CEL (Common Expression Language) expression to evaluate when this rule matches. Required when policy is CEL. The expression receives an ExecutionContext and must return either a ReturnValue or a bool (true = ALLOWLIST, false = BLOCKLIST).

custom_msg.title: Custom Message
custom_msg.description: Custom message to display in the block notification when this rule blocks an execution. Overrides the global BannedBlockMessage for this specific rule. Only applies to BLOCKLIST and SILENT_BLOCKLIST policies.

custom_url.title: Custom URL
custom_url.description: A custom URL for the block notification button, overriding the global EventDetailURL for this specific rule. Supports the same substitution placeholders as EventDetailURL (e.g. %file_identifier%, %machine_id%, %username%). Only applies to BLOCKLIST policies.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: A freeform comment or note about this rule for documentation purposes. Ignored by Santa at runtime.

StaticRules.title: Static Rules
StaticRules.description:
A static set of rules that always apply to the host, taking precedence over any rules configured by a sync server. The intended use-case is a small hardcoded set of rules that every host needs, such as management tools — not as a general-purpose rule database.

Setting this key (even to an empty array) also prevents local rule management via the santactl rule command.

EnableMenuItem.title: Enable Menu Item
EnableMenuItem.description: Show the Santa menu bar item.

AboutText.title: About Text
AboutText.description: Custom text to display at launch.

EventDetailURL.title: Event Detail URL
EventDetailURL.description:
The URL to open when the user gets a block notification. If unset, the button will not be displayed. Can include the following variables for substitution:
%file_identifier% - SHA-256 of the file that was blocked
%bundle_or_file_identifier% - SHA-256 of the file that was blocked or the bundle containing it, if available
%file_sha% - Deprecated, acts like bundle_or_file_identifier
%machine_id% - ID of the machine
%username% - The executing user
%serial% - System's serial number
%uuid% - System's UUID
%hostname% - System's full hostname

EventDetailText.title: Event Detail Text
EventDetailText.description: The text of the button for Event Detail URL.

FileAccessEventDetailURL.title: File Access Event Detail URL
FileAccessEventDetailURL.description:
The URL to open when the user gets a file access block notification. If unset, the button will not be displayed. Can include the following variables for substitution:
%rule_version% - Version of the rule that was violated
%rule_name% - Name of the rule that was violated
%accessed_path% - The path accessed by the binary
%file_identifier% - SHA-256 of the binary that performed the access
%username% - The executing user
%team_id% - The Team ID that signed the binary, if any
%signing_id% - The Signing ID of the binary, if any
%cdhash% - The binary's CDHash, if any
%machine_id% - ID of the machine
%hostname% - System's full hostname
%uuid% - System's UUID
%serial% - System's serial number

FileAccessEventDetailText.title: File Access Event Detail Text
FileAccessEventDetailText.description: The text of the button for File Access Event Detail URL.

UnknownBlockMessage.title: Unknown Block Message
UnknownBlockMessage.description: Custom message when an unknown binary is blocked.

DismissText.title: Dismiss Text
DismissText.description: The text to display on the button that dismisses the binary block dialog.

BannedBlockMessage.title: Banned Block Message
BannedBlockMessage.description: Custom message when a binary is blocked by a rule.

ModeNotificationMonitor.title: Monitor Notification Text
ModeNotificationMonitor.description: Custom message when entering MONITOR mode.

ModeNotificationLockdown.title: Lockdown Notification Text
ModeNotificationLockdown.description: Custom message when entering LOCKDOWN mode.

ModeNotificationStandalone.title: Standalone Notification Text
ModeNotificationStandalone.description: Custom message when entering STANDALONE mode. (undocumented)

BannedUSBBlockMessage.title: Banned USB Block Message
BannedUSBBlockMessage.description: Custom message when a Removable Media (e.g. USB device) is prevented from being mounted.

RemountUSBBlockMessage.title: Remount USB Block Message
RemountUSBBlockMessage.description: Custom message when a Removable Media (e.g. USB device) is allowed to be mounted with a subset of the requested flags as defined by RemountUSBMode.

FileAccessBlockMessage.title: File Access Block Message
FileAccessBlockMessage.description: Custom message when a file access is blocked by a rule.

BrandingCompanyName.title: Branding Company Name
BrandingCompanyName.description: Company name displayed in Santa UI. For GUI windows, this setting is ignored if BrandingCompanyLogo is set.

BrandingCompanyLogo.title: Branding Company Logo
BrandingCompanyLogo.description: A URL referencing a logo image to display on Santa UIs. The image will be scaled down appropriately to fit within image bounds (currently 84x28 pixels). If set, this overrides BrandingCompanyName. Supported URL schemes: file:// and data:. HTTP/HTTPS URLs are not supported.

BrandingCompanyLogoDark.title: Branding Company Logo (Dark Mode)
BrandingCompanyLogoDark.description: A URL referencing a logo image to display on Santa UIs. When the UI is displayed in dark mode and this is set, it overrides both BrandingCompanyLogo and BrandingCompanyName. Supported URL schemes: file:// and data:. HTTP/HTTPS URLs are not supported.

FunFontsOnSpecificDays.title: Fun Fonts On Specific Days
FunFontsOnSpecificDays.description: Enable themed fonts and images on April 1, May 4 and October 31.

SyncEnableProtoTransfer.title: Enable Proto Transfer
SyncEnableProtoTransfer.description: Enable binary proto transfer for sync instead of JSON.

SyncProxyConfiguration.title: Sync Proxy Configuration
SyncProxyConfiguration.description: Proxy configuration applied to all network requests made during syncing. This dictionary is passed directly to NSURLSessionConfiguration.connectionProxyDictionary. Keys are the kCFNetworkProxies* CFNetwork constants (e.g. HTTPEnable, HTTPProxy, HTTPPort, SOCKSEnable, ProxyAutoConfigURLString).

SyncEnableCleanSyncEventUpload.title: Enable Upload Clean Syncs
SyncEnableCleanSyncEventUpload.description: Upload events to the sync server even if a clean sync is requested.

ClientAuthCertificateFile.title: Client Certificate File Path
ClientAuthCertificateFile.description: Location of a PKCS#12 certificate to be used for sync authentication.

ClientAuthCertificateCN.title: Client Certificate Common Name
ClientAuthCertificateCN.description: The Common Name of a certificate in the System keychain to be used for sync authentication.

ClientAuthCertificateIssuerCN.title: Client Certificate Issuer Common Name
ClientAuthCertificateIssuerCN.description: The Issuer Name of a certificate in the System keychain to be used for sync authentication.

ServerAuthRootsFile.title: Server Authentication Certificate Roots (Local)
ServerAuthRootsFile.description: Path to an on-disk X.509 certificate (.pem). A valid PEM containing one or more certificates to be used for certificate pinning.

MachineOwnerGroups.title: Machine Owner Groups
MachineOwnerGroups.description: Groups the machine owner is a member of.

MachineOwnerPlist.title: Machine Owner Plist
MachineOwnerPlist.description: The path to a plist that contains the MachineOwnerKey / value pair.

MachineOwnerKey.title: Machine Owner Key
MachineOwnerKey.description: The key to use on Machine Owner Plist.

MachineOwnerGroupsKey.title: Machine Owner Groups Key
MachineOwnerGroupsKey.description: The key to use on MachineOwnerPlist to access defined groups.

MachineIDPlist.title: Machine ID Plist
MachineIDPlist.description: The path to a plist that contains the MachineIDKey / value pair.

MachineIDKey.title: Machine ID Key
MachineIDKey.description: The key to use on Machine ID Plist.

EnableAllEventUpload.title: Enable All Event Upload
EnableAllEventUpload.description: Upload all execution events to the sync server, including those explicitly allowed.

DisableUnknownEventUpload.title: Disable Unknown Event Upload
DisableUnknownEventUpload.description: Do not upload events for executions of unknown binaries allowed in monitor mode.

SyncClientContentEncoding.title: Sync Client Content Encoding
SyncClientContentEncoding.description: Content encoding used for sync requests.

SyncExtraHeaders.title: Sync Extra Headers
SyncExtraHeaders.description: Dictionary of additional headers to include in all requests made to the sync server. System-managed headers such as Content-Length, Host, and WWW-Authenticate will be ignored.

EventLogType.title: Event Log Type
EventLogType.description: Defines how event logs are stored. Allowed values: syslog, file, protobuf, json, null. Note: the protobuf and JSON formats are in BETA and subject to change.

EventLogPath.title: Event Log Path
EventLogPath.description: Path to the event log file (used for file/json logging).

SpoolDirectory.title: Spool Directory
SpoolDirectory.description: Base directory for protobuf maildir-like logs.

SpoolDirectoryFileSizeThresholdKB.title: Spool Max File Size
SpoolDirectoryFileSizeThresholdKB.description: Per-file size limit (KB) for protobuf spool files.

SpoolDirectorySizeThresholdMB.title: Spool Max Size
SpoolDirectorySizeThresholdMB.description: Total size limit (MB) for protobuf spool directory.

SpoolDirectoryEventMaxFlushTimeSec.title: Spool Max Event Buffer
SpoolDirectoryEventMaxFlushTimeSec.description: Maximum time (seconds) events are buffered before flushing to disk.

EnableMachineIDDecoration.title: Enable Machine ID Decoration
EnableMachineIDDecoration.description: Appends the MachineID to the end of each log line if enabled.

EntitlementsPrefixFilter.title: Entitlements Prefix Filter
EntitlementsPrefixFilter.description: Filters entitlements from execution telemetry by prefix. Entitlements are only logged when EventLogType is set to protobuf or json.

EntitlementsTeamIDFilter.title: Entitlements Team ID Filter
EntitlementsTeamIDFilter.description: Filters entitlements from execution telemetry by Team ID. Entitlements are only logged when EventLogType is set to protobuf or json.

TelemetryFilterExpressions.title: Telemetry Filter Expressions
TelemetryFilterExpressions.description: CEL expressions for filtering or redacting telemetry before upload. Only useful for Workshop customers.

MetricFormat.title: Metric Format
MetricFormat.description: Format to export metrics as, supported formats are "rawjson" for a single JSON blob and "monarchjson" for a format consumable by Google's Monarch tooling.

MetricURL.title: Metric URL
MetricURL.description: URL describing where monitoring metrics should be exported.

MetricExtraLabels.title: Metric Extra Labels
MetricExtraLabels.description: A map of key value pairs to add to all metric root labels. If a previously set key (e.g. host_name) is set to "" then the key is removed from the metric root labels. Alternatively if a value is set for an existing key then the new value will override the old.

EnableStandalonePasswordFallback.title: Enable Standalone Password Fallback
EnableStandalonePasswordFallback.description: Enable password authorization fallback for Standalone mode.

IgnoreOtherEndpointSecurityClients.title: Ignore Other Endpoint Security Clients
IgnoreOtherEndpointSecurityClients.description: Ignore events generated by other EndpointSecurity clients.

EnableStatsCollection.title: Enable Stats Collection
EnableStatsCollection.description: Send basic stats to North Pole Security

StatsOrganizationID.title: Stats Organization ID
StatsOrganizationID.description: North Pole Security customer ID for stats collection.

AntiSuspendSigningIDs.title: Anti Suspend Signing IDs
AntiSuspendSigningIDs.description: A list of Signing IDs to protect from `pid_suspend` calls.

AllowedSantaCommands.title: Allowed Santa Commands
AllowedSantaCommands.description: Array of allowed Santa commands. If unset, all commands are allowed; if set to an empty array, no commands are allowed.

AllowDelegatedSignals.title: Allow Delegated Signals
AllowDelegatedSignals.description: Allow signals delegated by launchd on behalf of Apple platform binaries targeting santad.

FileAccessPolicyPlist.title: File Access Policy Plist
FileAccessPolicyPlist.description: Path to a file access configuration plist.

FileAccessPolicy.title: File Access Policy
FileAccessPolicy.description: A complete file access policy embedded directly in the Santa configuration. When set, FileAccessPolicyPlist is ignored.

FileAccessPolicyUpdateIntervalSec.title: File Access Policy Update Interval
FileAccessPolicyUpdateIntervalSec.description: How often (in seconds) to re-read the file access policy config.

OverrideFileAccessAction.title: Override File Access Action
OverrideFileAccessAction.description: Global override for the enforcement of all file access policy rules.

FileAccessGlobalLogsPerSec.title: File Access Global Logs Per Second
FileAccessGlobalLogsPerSec.description: Average number of file access logs per second. Set to 0 to disable rate limiting.

FileAccessGlobalWindowSizeSec.title: File Access Global Window Size
FileAccessGlobalWindowSizeSec.description: Window size over which the log rate limit is applied. Set to 0 to disable rate limiting.

RemovableMediaAction.title: Removable Media Action
RemovableMediaAction.description: Action applied to all removable media devices.

RemovableMediaRemountFlags.title: Removable Media Remount Flags
RemovableMediaRemountFlags.description: Mount flags applied when removable media is remounted.

EncryptedRemovableMediaAction.title: Encrypted Removable Media Action
EncryptedRemovableMediaAction.description: Action applied to encrypted removable media devices.

EncryptedRemovableMediaRemountFlags.title: Encrypted Removable Media Remount Flags
EncryptedRemovableMediaRemountFlags.description: Mount flags applied when encrypted removable media is remounted.

OnStartUSBOptions.title: On Start USB Options
OnStartUSBOptions.description: Action applied to existing removable media when Santa starts.
